title: Simple JSON Schema
scenario: Generate a JSON schema for a simple address object with "street", "city", and "state" properties. The schema should define the data types for each property.
constraints: Must be a JSON object with a single "properties" key
Each property must have a "type" and a "required" field

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the generated schema is in the correct format.
Check if each property meets the constraints (data types and required field).
Evaluate if the schema correctly defines the data types for each property.
